title: PandaLand
description: A mod for the most awesome/tallest/coolest panda vtuber Utano Pandora
body:
A mod for the most awesome/tallest/coolest panda vtuber Utano Pandora

In this mod you can mine the precious PandOre and use it to make ingot or eat it if you want.


First you will have the possibility to mine Pandarium, the equipment craft with tha will have 10% bonus stat compare to iron

then you will have the possibility to mine PandOre, the equipment craft with tha will have 10% bonus stat compare to diamond

finally you will have the possibility to mine Pandarithe, the equipment craft with tha will have 10% bonus stat compare to netherite




I will add more in future especially construction block in general and maybe more . . . .
